attr.title: Attrition
attr.desc: Welcome to a world trapped in perpetual fighting. Attrition is a turn-based strategy game where three countries, Lutem, Bertas, and Cualitas, are constantly at war with one-another. Command their armies in a story of opposite opinions, sacrifices for one’s beliefs, and the quest for a greater goal. Here no one’s completely in the wrong, but no one’s completely in the right.
attr.inst: Purchase the game on Itch.io, download the zip with game and extract all files into assets folder. You can also use the free demo.
attr.inst_md: Purchase the game on [Itch.io](https://lmg3864.itch.io/attrition), download the zip with game and extract all files into `assets` folder. You can also use the free `demo`.
